headline: Palo Alto Networks (PANM) Strengthens Shareholder Value with $1B Buyback
summary: Palo Alto Networks, Inc. (NASDAQ:PANW) is one of the debt free halal stocks to buy. On March 11, Palo Alto Networks, Inc. (NASDAQ:PANW) said its board approved a new $1 billion stock buyback program. This decision was made on March 10, 2026, after the company’s earlier program had no funds left as of March 6. […]

headline: SentinelOne CEO: Microsoft has more vulnerabilities than any other company
summary: SentinelOne (NYSE:S) CEO Tomer Weingarten made a pointed claim on live TV recently that cuts right to the heart of the enterprise security debate: “Microsoft has the most vulnerabilities and that is factual than any other company in the world.” That is a bold statement. And it is the foundation of a broader investment thesis ... SentinelOne CEO: Microsoft has more vulnerabilities than any other company

headline: 2 Growth Stocks Set to Flourishand 1 We Turn Down
summary: Growth is oxygen. But when it evaporates, the consequences can be severe - ask anyone who bought Cisco in the Dot-Com Bubble or newer investors who lived through the 2020 to 2022 COVID cycle.

headline: Palo Alto Networks Deepens Security Platform With CyberArk Deal And Buybacks
summary: Palo Alto Networks (NasdaqGS:PANW) completed a roughly US$25b acquisition of CyberArk, adding identity security to its offerings. The company also expanded its share repurchase program by US$1b after fully using its prior buyback authorization. Palo Alto Networks is best known for network security, cloud security, and security operations tools, and CyberArk is widely associated with identity and access security. By combining these areas, PANW is moving further toward a single, platform...
